revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=信太神社 |画像=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
信太神社本殿 (2020年11月) |所在地=[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]九重283番地 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|20|11.1|N|135|33|13.4|E|region:JP-30_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]
[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]]
[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]]
[[神武天皇|神倭磐禮彦尊]]
[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] | 社格=[[村社]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] |本殿= }} '''信太神社'''（しのだじんじゃ）は、[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]にある[[神社]]。境内にある[[クスノキ]]は[[天然記念物]]。 ==概要== 当神社は九重・上中・田原・下中の氏神とされ、由緒などについては不詳だが[[天元 (日本)|天元]]2年（[[979年]]） 拝殿・御供所・神庫・楼門を改造したと伝わる。伝承では祭神は[[和泉国]]の[[信太森葛葉稲荷神社|信太の森]]から[[勧請]]されたものともいわれる。地元では土龍（[[モグラ]]）封じの神として知られ、この地域にはモグラが絶滅したと伝わる。[[明治]]42年 ([[1909年]]) 2月、[[村社]]となる。 ==祭神== * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] (アマテラス) *[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]]　(ニニギ) *[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]] (ニギハヤヒ) *神倭磐禮彦尊 ([[神武天皇]]) *[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] [[江戸時代]]後期の地誌[[紀伊続風土記]]には既に「境内に樟（クス）の大樹あり　圍三丈餘輪困陸離たり　社地の古き事知るへし」と記録がある。このクスノキは樹高約25[[メートル|m]]・幹周約7mの大樹、推定[[樹齢]]約400年の老樹だが樹上には多くの枝葉を茂らせ、樹勢はそれほど衰えていない。本幹の根元の立つ幹周2.1mの[[クロガネモチ]]の壮齢樹がこのクスの根元に抱合され、完全に癒合状態になった奇観を成している{{citeweb|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}}。[[昭和]]34年 ([[1959年]]) 1月8日、県から天然記念物に指定された現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 信太神社] – 和歌山県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたしんしや}} [[Category:和歌山県の神社]] [[Category:和歌山県指定天然記念物]] [[Category:著名なクス]] [[Category:橋本市の建築物]] [[Category:橋本市の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称=信太神社 |画像=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
信太神社本殿 (2020年11月) |所在地=[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]九重283番地 |位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|20|11.1|N|135|33|13.4|E|region:JP-30_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]
[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]]
[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]]
[[神武天皇|神倭磐禮彦尊]]
[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] | 社格=[[村社]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] |本殿= }} '''信太神社'''（しのだじんじゃ）は、[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]にある[[神社]]。境内にある[[クスノキ]]は[[天然記念物]]。 ==概要== 当神社は九重・上中・田原・下中の氏神とされ、由緒などについては不詳だが[[天元 (日本)|天元]]2年（[[979年]]） 拝殿・御供所・神庫・楼門を改造したと伝わる。伝承では祭神は[[和泉国]]の[[信太森葛葉稲荷神社|信太の森]]から[[勧請]]されたものともいわれる。地元では土龍（[[モグラ]]）封じの神として知られ、この地域にはモグラが絶滅したと伝わる。[[明治]]42年 ([[1909年]]) 2月、[[村社]]となる。 ==祭神== * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] (アマテラス) *[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]]　(ニニギ) *[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]] (ニギハヤヒ) *神倭磐禮彦尊 ([[神武天皇]]) *[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] [[江戸時代]]後期の地誌[[紀伊続風土記]]には既に「境内に樟（クス）の大樹あり　圍三丈餘輪困陸離たり　社地の古き事知るへし」と記録がある。このクスノキは樹高約25[[メートル|m]]・幹周約7mの大樹、推定[[樹齢]]約400年の老樹だが樹上には多くの枝葉を茂らせ、樹勢はそれほど衰えていない。本幹の根元の立つ幹周2.1mの[[クロガネモチ]]の壮齢樹がこのクスの根元に抱合され、完全に癒合状態になった奇観を成している{{citeweb|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}}。[[昭和]]34年 ([[1959年]]) 1月8日、県から天然記念物に指定された現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 信太神社] – 和歌山県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたしんしや}} [[Category:和歌山県の神社]] [[Category:橋本市の建築物]] [[Category:橋本市の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称=信太神社 |画像=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
信太神社本殿 (2020年11月) |所在地=[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]九重283番地 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 20| 緯度秒 = 11.1 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 33| 経度秒 = 13.4 |ラベル位置 = left |地図 = Japan Wakayama |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]

[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] | 社格=[[村社]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] |本殿= }} '''信太神社'''（しのだじんじゃ）は、[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]にある[[神社]]。境内にある[[クスノキ]]（信太神社の樟樹）は県指定の[[天然記念物]]。 ==概要== 当神社は九重・上中・田原・下中の氏神とされ、由緒などについては不詳だが[[979年]]（[[天元 (日本)|天元]]2年）、拝殿・御供所・神庫・楼門を改造したと伝わる。伝承では祭神は[[和泉国]]の[[聖神社 (和泉市)|信太の森]]から[[勧請]]されたものともいわれる。地元では土龍（[[モグラ]]）封じの神として知られ、この地域にはモグラが絶滅したと伝わる。 [[1909年]]（[[明治]]42年）2月、[[村社]]となる。 === 境内 === * 本殿（5社 木造銅板葺造 1社1,62m2）{{Cite web |url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * 社務所（木造瓦葺平屋造 25,9m2） ==祭神== * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] (アマテラス) *[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]] (ニニギ) *[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]] (ニギハヤヒ) *神倭磐禮彦尊 ([[神武天皇]]) *[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] [[江戸時代]]後期の地誌[[紀伊続風土記]]には既に「境内に樟（クス）の大樹あり 圍三丈餘輪困陸離たり 社地の古き事知るへし」と記録がある。このクスノキは樹高約25[[メートル|m]]・幹周約7mの大樹、推定[[樹齢]]約400年の老樹だが樹上には多くの枝葉を茂らせ、樹勢はそれほど衰えていない。本幹の根元の立つ幹周2.1mの[[クロガネモチ]]の壮齢樹がこのクスの根元に抱合され、完全に癒合状態になった奇観を成している{{citeweb|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}}。[[1959年]]（[[昭和]]34年）1月8日、県から天然記念物（信太神社の樟樹）に指定された現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置{{Cite web |url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}}。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 信太神社]-和歌山県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたしんしや}} [[Category:和歌山県の神社]] [[Category:橋本市の建築物]] [[Category:橋本市の歴史]] [[Category:和歌山県指定天然記念物]]

revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |Image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979年}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909年}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959年}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:信太神社]] {{Iwanaga Faith}}

At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year }} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:信太神社]] {{Iwanaga Faith}}

{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |Image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year }} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year }} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year }} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[category:completion tier 1]][[ja:信太神社]] {{Iwanaga Faith}} [[Category:New]]

According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森}}. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year }} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year }} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|12=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|12=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|12=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|12=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|12=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|12=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|12=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|12=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|12=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|12=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|12=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|天照大神|" to "|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|"
revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|12=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|12=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|12=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|12=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|12=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|12=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|12=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|12=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|12=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|12=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|12=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|12=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|12=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|12=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|12=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|12=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|12=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|12=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|12=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|12=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|12=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|12=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|12=draft|12=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|12=draft|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|12=draft|12=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|12=draft|12=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft|12=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft|12=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft|12=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft|12=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft|12=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|12=draft|12=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|12=draft|12=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|12=draft|12=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==外部リンク== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft|12=draft}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft|12=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft|12=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft|12=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|12=draft|12=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|12=draft|12=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|12=draft|12=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|12=draft|12=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|12=draft|12=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|12=draft|12=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|12=draft|12=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|12=draft|12=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|12=draft|12=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|12=draft|12=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|12=draft|12=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|12=draft|12=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|12=draft|12=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|12=draft|12=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|12=draft|12=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|12=draft|12=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|12=draft|12=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|12=draft|12=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|12=draft|12=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|12=draft|12=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|12=draft|12=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

revision.comment: 5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:信太神社 up to rev 97792769
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=信太神社 |画像=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
信太神社本殿 (2020年11月) |所在地=[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]九重283番地 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 20| 緯度秒 = 11.1 | 経度度 = 135| 経度分 = 33| 経度秒 = 13.4 |ラベル位置 = left |地図 = Japan Wakayama |祭神=[[天照大神|天照皇大神]]
[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]]
[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]]
[[神武天皇|神倭磐禮彦尊]]
[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] | 社格=[[村社]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] |本殿= }} '''信太神社'''（しのだじんじゃ）は、[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]にある[[神社]]。境内にある[[クスノキ]]（信太神社の樟樹）は県指定の[[天然記念物]]。 ==概要== 当神社は九重・上中・田原・下中の氏神とされ、由緒などについては不詳だが[[979年]]（[[天元 (日本)|天元]]2年）、拝殿・御供所・神庫・楼門を改造したと伝わる。伝承では祭神は[[和泉国]]の[[聖神社 (和泉市)|信太の森]]から[[勧請]]されたものともいわれる。地元では土龍（[[モグラ]]）封じの神として知られ、この地域にはモグラが絶滅したと伝わる。 [[1909年]]（[[明治]]42年）2月、[[村社]]となる。 === 境内 === * 本殿（5社 木造銅板葺造 1社1,62m2）{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * 社務所（木造瓦葺平屋造 25,9m2） ==祭神== * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] (アマテラス) *[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]] (ニニギ) *[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]] (ニギハヤヒ) *神倭磐禮彦尊 ([[神武天皇]]) *[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] [[江戸時代]]後期の地誌[[紀伊続風土記]]には既に「境内に樟（クス）の大樹あり 圍三丈餘輪困陸離たり 社地の古き事知るへし」と記録がある。このクスノキは樹高約25[[メートル|m]]・幹周約7mの大樹、推定[[樹齢]]約400年の老樹だが樹上には多くの枝葉を茂らせ、樹勢はそれほど衰えていない。本幹の根元の立つ幹周2.1mの[[クロガネモチ]]の壮齢樹がこのクスの根元に抱合され、完全に癒合状態になった奇観を成している{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}}。[[1959年]]（[[昭和]]34年）1月8日、県から天然記念物（信太神社の樟樹）に指定された現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}}。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 信太神社]-和歌山県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたしんしや}} [[Category:和歌山県の神社]] [[Category:橋本市の建築物]] [[Category:橋本市の歴史]] [[Category:和歌山県指定天然記念物]]

[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]]
[[神武天皇|神倭磐禮彦尊]]
[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] | 社格=[[村社]] | 創建=不詳 | 例祭=[[10月15日]] |本殿= }} '''信太神社'''（しのだじんじゃ）は、[[和歌山県]][[橋本市]][[高野口町]]にある[[神社]]。境内にある[[クスノキ]]（信太神社の樟樹）は県指定の[[天然記念物]]。 ==概要== 当神社は九重・上中・田原・下中の氏神とされ、由緒などについては不詳だが[[979年]]（[[天元 (日本)|天元]]2年）、拝殿・御供所・神庫・楼門を改造したと伝わる。伝承では祭神は[[和泉国]]の[[聖神社 (和泉市)|信太の森]]から[[勧請]]されたものともいわれる。地元では土龍（[[モグラ]]）封じの神として知られ、この地域にはモグラが絶滅したと伝わる。 [[1909年]]（[[明治]]42年）2月、[[村社]]となる。 === 境内 === * 本殿（5社 木造銅板葺造 1社1,62m2）{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * 社務所（木造瓦葺平屋造 25,9m2） ==祭神== * [[天照大神|天照皇大神]] (アマテラス) *[[ニニギ|天津彦火々瓊々杵尊]] (ニニギ) *[[ニギハヤヒ|饒早日尊]] (ニギハヤヒ) *神倭磐禮彦尊 ([[神武天皇]]) *[[イワナガヒメ|磐長比賣命]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] [[江戸時代]]後期の地誌[[紀伊続風土記]]には既に「境内に樟（クス）の大樹あり 圍三丈餘輪困陸離たり 社地の古き事知るへし」と記録がある。このクスノキは樹高約25[[メートル|m]]・幹周約7mの大樹、推定[[樹齢]]約400年の老樹だが樹上には多くの枝葉を茂らせ、樹勢はそれほど衰えていない。本幹の根元の立つ幹周2.1mの[[クロガネモチ]]の壮齢樹がこのクスの根元に抱合され、完全に癒合状態になった奇観を成している{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}}。[[1959年]]（[[昭和]]34年）1月8日、県から天然記念物（信太神社の樟樹）に指定された現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5年3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}}。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 信太神社]-和歌山県神社庁 {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:しのたしんしや}} [[Category:和歌山県の神社]] [[Category:橋本市の建築物]] [[Category:橋本市の歴史]] [[Category:和歌山県指定天然記念物]]

{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{translated page|ja|信太神社|version=97792769|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[Category:New]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|qq=draft|qq=draft}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|qq=draft|qq=draft}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|qq=draft|qq=draft}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|qq=draft|qq=draft}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|qq=draft|qq=draft}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|qq=draft|qq=draft}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{translated page|ja|信太神社|version=97792769|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meter|qq=}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurogane Mochi|qq=}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1959|qq=}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Showa Period|qq=}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{translated page|ja|信太神社|version=97792769|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Wakayama Prefecture Designated Natural Monuments]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

revision.text:
{{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location={{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakayama Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto City|qq=}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takano-guchi Town|qq=}} Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities={{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|qq=}}
{{ill|Ninigi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninigi|qq=}}
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|qq=}}
{{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Jimmu|qq=}}
{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanagahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanaga-hime|qq=}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 15|qq=}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine|qq=}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakayama Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto City|qq=}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takano-guchi Town|qq=}}. The {{ill|camphor tree|ja|クスノキ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/camphor tree|qq=}} on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated {{ill|Natural Monument|ja|天然記念物|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Natural Monument|qq=}}. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in {{ill|979|ja|979th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/979|qq=}} (the 2nd year of {{ill|Tengen (Japan)|ja|天元 (日本)|lt=Tengen|lt_ja=天元|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tengen (Japan)|qq=}}) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrined|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjō|qq=}} from the {{ill|Izumi Province|ja|和泉国|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumi Province|qq=}}’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishinja (Izumi City)|qq=}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mole|qq=}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In {{ill|1909|ja|1909th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1909|qq=}} (February of the 42nd year of {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|1=Meiji era|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji era|qq=}}), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|1=Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|lt=Amaterasu Imperial Deity|lt_ja=天照皇大神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|qq=}} (アマテラス) * {{ill|Ninigi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ninigi-no-Mikoto|lt=Ninigi|ja|ニニギ|lt=Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=天津彦火々瓊々杵尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninigi|qq=}} (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|qq=}} (ニギハヤヒ) * {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|ja|神武天皇|lt=Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto|lt_ja=神倭磐禮彦尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Jimmu|qq=}} * {{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanagahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanaga-hime|qq=}} (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii Continuation Fudoki|qq=}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 {{ill|Meter|ja|メートル|lt=m|lt_ja=m|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meter|qq=}} and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of {{ill|Kurogane Mochi|ja|クロガネモチ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kurogane Mochi|qq=}} with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, {{ill|1959|ja|1959th year|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1959|qq=}} (the 34th year of {{ill|Showa Period|ja|昭和|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Showa Period|qq=}}), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{translated page|ja|信太神社|version=97792769|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]

{{ill|Iwanagahime|ja|イワナガヒメ|1=Iwanaga-hime|lt=Iwanaga Hime|lt_ja=磐長比賣命|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanagahime|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwanaga-hime|qq=}} |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival={{ill|October 15|ja|10月15日|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October 15|qq=}} |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a {{ill|Shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine|qq=}} located in {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|ja|和歌山県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakayama Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Hashimoto City|ja|橋本市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hashimoto City|qq=}}{{ill|Takano-guchi Town|ja|高野口町|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takano-guchi Town|qq=}}. {{Shrine |Name=Shinodajinja |image=[[File: Shinodajinjya Honden.jpg |260px]]
Shinodajinja Main Hall (信太神社本殿) (November 2020) |Location=[[:en:Wakayama Prefecture|Wakayama Prefecture]][[:en:Hashimoto, Wakayama|Hashimoto City]][[:en:Kōyaguchi, Wakayama|Takano-guchi Town]] Kuju 283 |LatitudeDegrees=34 |LatitudeMinutes=20|LatitudeSeconds=11.1 |LongitudeDegrees=135|LongitudeMinutes=33|LongitudeSeconds=13.4 |LabelPosition=left |Map=Japan Wakayama |EnshrinedDeities=[[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Imperial Deity]]
[[:en:Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto]]
{{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|qq=}}
[[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto]]
[[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanaga Hime]] |ShrineRank={{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}} |Foundation=Unknown |AnnualFestival=[[:en:October 15|October 15]] |MainHall= }} '''Shinodajinja''' (しのだじんじゃ) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Wakayama Prefecture|Wakayama Prefecture]][[:en:Hashimoto, Wakayama|Hashimoto City]][[:en:Kōyaguchi, Wakayama|Takano-guchi Town]]. The [[:en:Camphora officinarum|camphor tree]] on the shrine grounds (the camphor tree of Shinodajinja) is a prefecturally designated [[:en:Natural monument|Natural Monument]]. ==概要== This shrine is regarded as the guardian deity for the regions of Kuju, Uenaka, Tahara, and Shimonaka. Although its origins and history remain unknown, it is said that in [[:en:979|979]] (the 2nd year of [[:en:Tengen (era)|Tengen]]) the worship hall, offering hall, treasury, and tower gate were rebuilt. According to tradition, the enshrined deities were also said to have been {{ill|enshrined|ja|勧請|lt=Enshrinement|1=Kanjō|2=ja|3=分霊|4=es|5=Bunrei|6=id|7=Kanjō|8=zh|9=分靈|10=fr|11=Kanjō|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrined|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanjō|qq=}} from the [[:en:Izumi Province|Izumi Province]]’s {{ill|Seishinja (Izumi City)|ja|聖神社 (和泉市)|lt=Shinta no Mori|lt_ja=信太の森|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Seishinja (Izumi City)|qq=}}. Locally, the shrine is known as the deity who seals away moles ({{ill|Mole|ja|モグラ|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mole|qq=}}), with local lore claiming that moles have become extinct in the area. In [[:en:1909|1909]] (February of the 42nd year of [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]]), it attained the status of a {{ill|Village Shrine|ja|村社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|qq=}}. === 境内 === * Main Hall (housing 5 shrines; wooden structure with a copper-plated roof; 1.62m2){{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 |title=信太神社 |access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県神社庁}} * Shrine Office (wooden, tiled-roof, single-story structure; 25.9m2) ==祭神== * [[:en:Amaterasu|Amaterasu Imperial Deity]] (アマテラス) * [[:en:Ninigi-no-Mikoto|Tenshin Hiko-Funahiko no Mikoto]] (ニニギ) * {{ill|Nigihayahi|ja|ニギハヤヒ|lt=Josasai Hiyori no Mikoto|lt_ja=饒早日尊|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nigihayahi|qq=}} (ニギハヤヒ) * [[:en:Emperor Jimmu|Kamiyawainarehiko no Mikoto]] * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanaga Hime]] (イワナガヒメ) ==天然記念物== [[File: Shinodajinjya Kusu.jpg|thumb|220px|信太神社の樟樹]] According to late Edo Period local geography records such as the {{ill|Kii Continuation Fudoki|ja|紀伊続風土記|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii Continuation Fudoki|qq=}}, it is noted that "within the precincts there stands a great camphor tree (クス) surrounded by more than three jō in circumference, bearing witness to the ancient history of the shrine grounds." This camphor tree is a grand specimen with an approximate height of 25 [[:en:Metre|m]] and a trunk circumference of about 7 m. Estimated to be around 400 years old, the tree still boasts a luxuriant canopy with its vigor hardly diminished. At the base of its main trunk, a venerable specimen of [[:en:Ilex rotunda|Kurogane Mochi]] with a trunk circumference of 2.1 m has become completely fused with the camphor tree’s root, forming a rare natural phenomenon.{{Cite web|和書|url= http://www.city.hashimoto.lg.jp/guide/kyoikuiinkai/syougaku/bunka/bunnkazai/wakayamaken_siteibunkazai/omobun/1359698878625.html|publisher=橋本市|title=信太神社の樟樹|accessdate=2021-2-11}} On January 8, [[:en:1959|1959]] (the 34th year of [[:en:Shōwa era|Showa Period]]), the camphor tree of Shinodajinja was designated a Natural Monument by the prefectural authorities.現地案内看板、橋本市教育委員会、平成5th year 3月設置{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.pref.wakayama.lg.jp/prefg/500700/mokuroku/kenkinenbutsu.html |title=県指定文化財・記念物（信太神社の樟樹）|access-date=2022-10-21 |publisher=和歌山県教育委員会}} ==脚注== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://wakayama-jinjacho.or.jp/jdb/sys/user/GetWjtTbl.php?JinjyaNo=4039 Shinodajinja] - Wakayama Prefecture Shrine Agency {{Shinto Navigation}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{Iwanaga Faith}} {{translated page|ja|信太神社|version=97792769|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Wakayama Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Hashimoto City]] [[Category:History of Hashimoto City]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]] }} [[ja:信太神社]]
